coverage.notes: Core public identity, services and free membership covered.
Free membership, questionnaire, dashboard, cancellation, pause and mobile access covered.
Individual, Couples, Teens, Staff and Gift are covered at overview level. Teens/minor policy has contradiction/gap and needs internal verification.

R545/R995/L1/L2, Payfast, cards/EFT, medical aid and refunds covered; live checkout prices should be verified before payment UX.
Matching, L1/L2, vetting, registrations and therapist change covered.
Condition list covered, with high-risk conditions routed carefully.
Anonymous use and encryption claims covered. Full Privacy Policy extraction failed; POPIA/data retention/deletion need legal source indexing.
FAQ refund and cancellation content covered. Full Terms & Conditions extraction failed and should be added.
Email, WhatsApp, location, membership support and load shedding covered.
